name: Country-Style Venison
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds Venison chuck roast, boneless, 1 1/2 inch cubes
4 Stalks Celery, Cut into 2-inch Long Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large, heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Brown venison cubes on all sides.
2. Add water and red wine to the skillet; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low, add scallions, salt, and black pepper. Cover and simmer for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
4. Stir in the vegetables (onions, carrots, potatoes, kohlrabi, and celery). Cover and continue simmering for an additional 20 minutes, or until all vegetables are tender.
5. Serve over hot cooked rice.
6. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
